meta.title: Corredor — AI-Powered Real Estate CRM for Argentina
meta.description: Manage properties, leads, and operations from one place. AI copilot, owner portal, and integration with Argentine listing sites.

hero.title:
The real estate CRM
your team will actually use
hero.subtitle: Properties, leads, contracts, and billing in one place — with an AI copilot that works while you sleep.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: Each module solves a real problem in the daily operations of an Argentine real estate agency.

properties.title: Properties
properties.desc: Complete listings with photos, floor plans, video tours, and geolocation.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.desc: Unified CRM for owners, tenants, buyers, and colleagues.

pipeline.title: Sales Pipeline
pipeline.desc: Visual Kanban board to track every sale and rental opportunity.

inbox.title: Unified Inbox
inbox.desc: WhatsApp, email, and portals in a single inbox with auto-assignment.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.desc: Assign and track team tasks with deadlines and priorities.

showings.title: Showings
showings.desc: Schedule visits, confirm attendance, and capture feedback instantly.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.desc: Generate digital contracts with built-in electronic signatures.

billing.title: Billing & Expenses
billing.desc: Automated rent settlements, receipts, and payment tracking.

ownerPortal.title: Owner Portal
ownerPortal.desc: Owners see their properties, payments, and documents online.

tenantPortal.title: Tenant Portal
tenantPortal.desc: Claims, payment receipts, and documents for each tenant.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.desc: Real-time dashboards for sales, occupancy, and team performance.

portals.title: Listing Sites
portals.desc: Auto-publish to ZonaProp, Argenprop, Mercado Libre, and more.

website.title: Website
website.desc: Your own property search site, SEO-optimized with your branding.

documents.title: Documents
documents.desc: Central repository for deeds, contracts, guarantees, and more.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.desc: Auto-replies, lead summaries, and smart recommendations.

reports.title: Reports
reports.desc: Export custom PDF and Excel reports for property owners.

teams.title: Teams
teams.desc: Roles, permissions, and metrics per agent, branch, or franchise.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.desc: Open API and connectors for Tokko, Zonaprop, Google, and WhatsApp.

migration.title: Switching is easier than you think
migration.subtitle: Move from your current system to Corredor in 3 simple steps.

export.title: Export your data
export.desc: Download a CSV from your current CRM or send us the file.

import.title: We import everything
import.desc: Our team maps and migrates properties, contacts, and history.

work.title: Start working
work.desc: Your team starts with all data ready from day one.

items.quote: Corredor saved us 15 hours per week on admin tasks. The AI copilot is a game-changer for responding to portal inquiries.
items.name: María González

items.quote: We migrated from Tokko in 48 hours. What surprised us most was that we didn't lose a single record from our client history.
items.name: Carlos Benedetti

items.quote: The owner portal eliminated 80% of the calls we received asking for account statements. Owners are thrilled.
items.name: Luciana Martínez

cta.title: Your agency deserves world-class tools
cta.subtitle: Join 200+ brokers already managing their operations with Corredor.

pricing.title: A plan for every agency
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no mandatory annual contracts. Pay in pesos or dollars.
pricing.bnaRate: BNA exchange rate: {rate} ARS/USD as of {date}

trial.name: Trial
trial.desc: 14 days to try everything, no credit card required.

agency.name: Agency
agency.desc: For teams of up to 10 people.

items.q: Can I change plans at any time?
items.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade whenever you want. Changes are prorated on your next invoice.

items.q: What happens when the free trial ends?
items.a: Your account switches to read-only mode. You don't lose any data — just pick a plan to keep going.

items.q: Do you accept payments in Argentine pesos?
items.a: Yes, you can pay with a credit or debit card in ARS, or via bank transfer. We also accept USD for companies that prefer dollar invoicing.
Yes, for Agency, Pro, and Enterprise plans we include free assisted migration. For the Solo plan, we offer self-import tools.

items.q: Are there discounts for real estate associations?
items.a: Yes, we offer special pricing for professional associations and real estate chambers. Contact us for details.

about.title: Technology built for the Argentine real estate market
about.subtitle: Corredor was born from the frustration of using generic tools that don't understand local operations.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: To give every Argentine real estate broker the tools that were once exclusive to big international franchises — but designed for the local reality, with pesos, Argentine listing sites, and current regulations.

story.title: Why Corredor?
story.text: After years of using generic CRMs and Excel spreadsheets, a group of brokers and developers decided to build the tool they wished they'd had from day one. Corredor is the result of hundreds of hours of conversations with real estate agencies across the country.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: News, guides, and best practices for the modern real estate agency.

footer.tagline: AI-powered real estate CRM for Argentina.

tour.title: See Corredor from the inside
tour.subtitle: Walk through the main modules and discover how Corredor simplifies your daily operations.

properties.title: Property Management
properties.desc: Complete listings with HD photos, floor plans, video tours, and precise geolocation. Auto-publish to top Argentine listing sites.

pipeline.title: Sales Pipeline
pipeline.desc: Visual Kanban board to track every opportunity from first contact to close. Never lose a lead again.

inbox.title: Unified Inbox
inbox.desc: WhatsApp, email, listing sites — all in one inbox. Auto-assignment to the right agent with AI-suggested replies.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.desc: Your smart assistant that answers inquiries, generates property descriptions, and summarizes conversations automatically.

billing.title: Billing & Settlements
billing.desc: Automate rental settlements, generate receipts, and track payments with banking integration.
